name: MP9 | 黑暗时代
descriptionEn: Manufactured in Switzerland, the cutting-edge MP9 SMG is an ergonomic polymer weapon favored by private security firms. It has been painted with metallic paints to look as though it has been inlaid with metals in a medieval motif. I could kill her paramour... perhaps that would buy you some time with Valeria - A Father's Love Part 2
descriptionZh: 由瑞士制造，尖端的 MP9 微型冲锋枪是一把符合人类工效学的聚合物武器，深受私人保安公司青睐。 这把武器使用金属涂料进行了涂装，以使其看上去像是嵌入了具有中世纪主题图案的金属。 我可以杀掉她的情夫…… 也许这能为你和瓦莱里娅争取一些时间 -《父爱（中）》
